verses.latin_vulgate: In finem. Psalmus David.   Judica me, Domine, quoniam ego in innocentia mea ingressus sum,  et in Domino sperans non infirmabor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְדָוִ֨ד ׀ שׇׁפְטֵ֤נִי יְהֹוָ֗ה כִּֽי־אֲ֭נִי בְּתֻמִּ֣י הָלַ֑כְתִּי וּבַיהֹוָ֥ה בָּ֝טַ֗חְתִּי לֹ֣א אֶמְעָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Unto the end, a psalm for David. Judge me, O Lord, for I have walked in my innocence: and I have put my trust in the Lord, and shall not be weakened.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi. Tuomitse minua, Herra; sillä minä olen vakuudessani vaeltanut: ja minä toivon Herraan, sentähden en minä livistele.
verses.king_james: Judge me, O Lord; for I have walked in mine integrity: I have trusted also in the Lord; therefore I shall not slide.

verses.latin_vulgate: Proba me, Domine, et tenta me ;  ure renes meos et cor meum.
verses.douay_rheims: Prove me, O Lord, and try me; burn my reins and my heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Koettele minua, Herra, ja kiusaa minua: puhdista minun munaskuuni ja sydämeni.
verses.king_james: Examine me, O Lord, and prove me; try my reins and my heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam misericordia tua ante oculos meos est,  et complacui in veritate tua.
verses.douay_rheims: For thy mercy is before my eyes; and I am well pleased with thy truth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinun hyvyytes on silmäini edessä, ja minä vaellan sinun totuudessas.
verses.king_james: For thy lovingkindness is before mine eyes: and I have walked in thy truth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non sedi cum concilio vanitatis,  et cum iniqua gerentibus non introibo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־יָ֭שַׁבְתִּי עִם־מְתֵי־שָׁ֑וְא וְעִ֥ם נַ֝עֲלָמִ֗ים לֹ֣א אָבֽוֹא׃
verses.douay_rheims: I have not sat with the council of vanity: neither will I go in with the doers of unjust things.
verses.finnish_biblia: En minä istu turhain ihmisten seassa, enkä seuraa petollisia.
verses.king_james: I have not sat with vain persons, neither will I go in with dissemblers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Odivi ecclesiam malignantium,  et cum impiis non sedebo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׂ֭נֵאתִי קְהַ֣ל מְרֵעִ֑ים וְעִם־רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים לֹ֣א אֵשֵֽׁב׃
verses.douay_rheims: I have hated the assembly of the malignant; and with the wicked I will not sit.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä vihaan pahain seurakuntaa, enkä istu jumalattomain tykönä.
verses.king_james: I have hated the congregation of evil doers; and will not sit with the wicked.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lavabo inter innocentes manus meas,  et circumdabo altare tuum, Domine :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶרְחַ֣ץ בְּנִקָּי֣וֹן כַּפָּ֑י וַאֲסֹבְבָ֖ה אֶת־מִזְבַּחֲךָ֣ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will wash my hands among the innocent; and will compass thy altar, O Lord:
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä pesen käteni viattomuudessa, ja oleskelen, Herra, alttaris tykönä,
verses.king_james: I will wash mine hands in innocency: so will I compass thine altar, O Lord:

verses.latin_vulgate: ut audiam vocem laudis,  et enarrem universa mirabilia tua.
verses.douay_rheims: That I may hear the voice of thy praise: and tell of all thy wondrous works.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kussa kiitossanan ääni kuullaan, ja kaikki sinun ihmees saarnataan.
verses.king_james: That I may publish with the voice of thanksgiving, and tell of all thy wondrous works.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine, dilexi decorem domus tuæ,  et locum habitationis gloriæ tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְֽהֹוָ֗ה אָ֭הַבְתִּי מְע֣וֹן בֵּיתֶ֑ךָ וּ֝מְק֗וֹם מִשְׁכַּ֥ן כְּבוֹדֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: I have loved, O Lord, the beauty of thy house; and the place where thy glory dwelleth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, minä rakastin sinun huonees asuinsiaa ja sitä siaa, jossa sinun kunnias asuu.
verses.king_james: Lord, I have loved the habitation of thy house, and the place where thine honour dwelleth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ne perdas cum impiis, Deus, animam meam,  et cum viris sanguinum vitam meam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תֶּאֱסֹ֣ף עִם־חַטָּאִ֣ים נַפְשִׁ֑י וְעִם־אַנְשֵׁ֖י דָמִ֣ים חַיָּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Take not away my soul, O God, with the wicked: nor my life with bloody men:
verses.finnish_biblia: Älä tempaa minun sieluani pois syntisten kanssa ja henkeäni verikoirain kanssa,
verses.king_james: Gather not my soul with sinners, nor my life with bloody men:

verses.latin_vulgate: in quorum manibus iniquitates sunt ;  dextera eorum repleta est muneribus.
verses.douay_rheims: In whose hands are iniquities: their right hand is filled with gifts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jotka pahanjuoniset ovat ja mielellänsä lahjoja ottavat.
verses.king_james: In whose hands is mischief, and their right hand is full of bribes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego autem in innocentia mea ingressus sum ;  redime me, et miserere mei.
verses.douay_rheims: But as for me, I have walked in my innocence: redeem me, and have mercy on me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä vaellan viattomuudessani: vapahda minua ja ole minulle armollinen!
verses.king_james: But as for me, I will walk in mine integrity: redeem me, and be merciful unto me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pes meus stetit in directo ;  in ecclesiis benedicam te, Domine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֭גְלִי עָמְדָ֣ה בְמִישׁ֑וֹר בְּ֝מַקְהֵלִ֗ים אֲבָרֵ֥ךְ יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: My foot hath stood in the direct way: in the churches I will bless thee, O Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun jalkani käy oikiasti: minä kiitän Herraa seurakunnissa.
verses.king_james: My foot standeth in an even place: in the congregations will I bless the Lord.
